SourceImages.AppearanceConstraint: All character appearances and clothing must remain exactly as shown in the source images with perfect detail accuracy.
SourceImages.AgeHint: All characters appear approximately 18 years old.

PhotoSetting.Location: A completely featureless, empty room with no visible environmental details.

Arrangement.Grouping: All four characters must be grouped very closely together.
Arrangement.Facing: All characters must face directly toward the camera.
Arrangement.Leaning: All characters must lean slightly inward toward the center.

DepthConstraints.CameraDistance: All characters positioned near the camera.
DepthConstraints.Separation: Minimal depth is required. No background separation between characters is allowed.

Arrangement.Visibility: All characters must be fully visible and unobstructed.

CameraPerspective.Holder: Exactly one character holds the camera at arm’s length.
CameraPerspective.DeviceVisibility: The camera or device must not appear anywhere in the frame.

HeightAndBodyConstraints.HardRequirement: These constraints are mandatory and must not be altered or contradicted.
HeightAndBodyConstraints.UniversalBodyType: All characters must be equally tall and slender in overall proportion.

CharacterSpecifications.Wizard: Exactly 5'11" in height. Slender and tall overall. Exhibits a queen-like, aloof, regal presence. Must remain height-consistent with all other characters.

Constraints.ExactCount: Exactly 4 distinct characters must be visible.
Constraints.SingleHolder: Only one character provides the selfie perspective.
